message:
fix(http): properly construct URL from options in http.request()

Fixed bug where http.get() and http.request() would fail when given
a URL string because the URL was incorrectly constructed. Now properly
handles three cases:
- Direct URL string: http.request('http://example.com/path')
- options.url: http.request({ url: 'http://example.com/path' })
- hostname/host: http.request({ hostname: 'example.com', path: '/path' })

Also adds proper port handling in URL construction.
